mappings.rationaleAI: Ancient Egypt's polytheistic religion spanning Old, Middle, and New Kingdoms directly addresses Egyptian religion (A.3), including religious literature, mythology, the Egyptian pantheon, and religious symbolism.

The history of religion from early polytheism through the Axial Age covers ancient Near Eastern (A), Iranian (B), Greek (C), Roman (D), and Hellenistic (E) religious developments.
